title: JoinOpt
description: A perfermance plugin for edit minecraft join/exit messages with actions and welcome rewards.
body: ## Introduce JoinOpt - A plugin for edit Join/Exit messages A perfermance plugin for edit minecraft join/exit messages with actions and welcome rewards. ![JoinOpt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afc34cf41f91f54d0833ba12942c01aff44d1479.png) ## What we can do? - Edit Join/Exit message and First Join message. - Run command/message when click message or auto run when join. - Give rewards to player that welcome newbie. ## Bstats
